code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
mut sorted = true
mut in_num = false
mut cur = 0
mut neg = false

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_space
    if in_num
      let val = if neg
        0 - cur
      else
        cur
      end
      if has_prev
        if val < prev
          sorted = false
        end
      end
      prev = val
      has_prev = true
      in_num = false
      cur = 0
      neg = false
    end
  else
    if not in_num and b == 45
      neg = true
      in_num = true
    else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    else
      in_num = true
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
